card.name: Tomie Kawakami
card.text: {2}{B}: Monstrosity 2. (If this creature isn't monstrous, put two +1/+1 counters on it and it becomes monstrous.) When Tomie becomes monstrous, create a token that's a copy of Tomie, except it isn't legendary. (The token has no counters and isn't monstrous.)

card.name: Raku-chan
card.text: When Raku-chan enters, create a 1/1 red Squirrel creature token. {G}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target Squirrel or Cat creature you control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Operator
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature you control gains flying until end of turn. You may return it to your hand at the beginning of the next main phase.

card.name: My Deer Friend Nokotan
card.text: When My Deer Friend Nokotan enters, create a Clue token named Deer Cracker. (It's an artifact with {2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.)

card.name: Silence Suzuka
card.text: Trample View from the Lead — Silence Suzuka gets +1/+1 for each land you control.

card.name: Make Your Choice
card.text: Choose target creature. Its controller faces a villainous choice — They sacrifice that creature, or you draw three cards and you lose 3 life.

card.name: Agony
card.text: Agony deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Maelle, Virtuose Duelist
card.text: If a source you control would deal damage to an opponent, it deals that much damage plus 1 instead. [+1]: Create a 1/1 colorless Elemental creature token with haste. [0]: Maelle deals 1 damage to each opponent. Add {R}. [-6]: Untap all creatures you control. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

card.name: Night in the Woods
card.text: Choose one — • Create a tapped colorless land token named Everywhere that is every basic land type. • Destroy target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Long Way Home
card.text: Destroy target creature, artifact or enchantment. Its controller creates two Clue tokens. (It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

card.name: Anne Boonchuy
card.text: When Anne Boonchuy enters, create Sprig, a legendary 2/2 green Frog creature token with "Creature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast." [+1]: You gain 3 life. [0]: Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures. [-6]: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control, then double the number of +1/+1 counters on each creature you control.

card.name: Oguri Cap
card.text: Whenever Oguri Cap enters or attacks, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.") Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on Oguri Cap.

card.name: Stanley Pines, Grunkle Stan
card.text: Menace Whenever Stanley Pines deals combat damage to a player, create a Treasure token. Then exile the top card of your library. You may cast it this turn if you spend mana from a Treasure to cast it.

card.name: Kinger, C&A Programmer
card.text: Mentor (Whenever this creature attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on target attacking creature with lesser power.) Whenever Kinger mentors a nontoken creature, create a 1/1 blue Insect creature token with flying and "This token can block only creatures with flying."

card.name: Daitaku Helios
card.text: W Rizz — Whenever an opponent activates an ability that isn't a mana ability, amass Fans 1. (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. It's also a Fan. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Fan Army creature token first.)

card.name: All Work and No Play
card.text: Counter target spell. If that spell's mana value was 3 or greater, that spell's controller creates a tapped Treasure token.

card.name: All There Is to It
card.text: Heckbent — Destroy target creature if it has mana value 3 or less or if you have one or fewer cards in hand.

card.name: Run Away Together
card.text: Choose two target creatures controlled by different players. Return those creatures to their owners' hands.

card.name: Zacian, Intrepid Sword
card.text: When Zacian enters, up to one target creature becomes a legendary Equipment artifact named Rusted Sword with "Equipped creature gets +2/+0" and equip {2} and loses all other types and abilities.

card.name: Adina Astra, Seeker of Stars
card.text: {G}, {T}: You may put a card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped and face down. It's a land named Star with "{T}: Add one mana of any color." {3}{U}{U}, {T}: Turn a permanent you control face up.

card.name: Yue's Sacrifice
card.text: Turn target nonland permanent face down, then tap it. It's a land named Moon with "{T}: Add one mana of any color."

card.name: Trobbio, Master of the Stage
card.text: Spells you control can't be countered. Trobbio has flying and is black as long as it has one or more counters on it. Undying (When this creature dies, if it had no +1/+1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a +1/+1 counter on it.)

card.name: Judy Álvarez, BD Technician
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Braindance — When Judy Álvarez enters, exile target instant or sorcery card from a graveyard. You may cast it this turn and mana of any type may can be spent to cast that spell. If that spell would be put into a graveyard, exile it instead.

card.name: Key Bearer
card.text: Flying When Key Bearer dies, create Key Piece, a legendary colorless artifact token with "{T}: Tap or untap target creature. Activate only as a sorcery."

card.name: The Thing
card.text: You may have The Thing enter as a copy of any creature on the battlefield except it has "{2}, Sacrifice another creature: The Thing becomes a copy of the sacrificed creature."

card.name: The Dark Urge
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, each opponent may sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card. Then The Dark Urge deals damage equal to its power to each opponent who didn't sacrifice a permanent or discard a card this way.

card.name: Siffrin, the Traveler
card.text: Whenever a creature dies, each opponent loses 1 life. [+1]: Mill two cards. [0]: Create a 3/2 black Human Elemental creature token with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.) [-4]: Return target creature or planeswalker from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it.

card.name: Crime Spree
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {U} — Target creature can't be blocked this turn. + {U} — Tap or untap target creature. + {1}{U} — Return target creature to its owners hand. Draw a card.

card.name: Princess Celestia
card.text: Whenever another creature you control enters, you gain 1 life. [+1]: Create a 1/1 white Horse creature token. [0]: Target creature you control becomes an Alicorn. Put a flying counter on it. (It becomes an Alicorn forever.) [-4]: Create a white enchantment token named Royal Presence with "Creatures you control get +1/+1."

card.name: Devil You Know
card.text: Target opponent separates their hand into a face-up pile and a face-down pile. Choose one of those piles, reveal it, and choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card.

card.name: Matikanefukukitaru
card.text: Whenever Matikanefukukitaru attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on target attacking creature. {7}: Put a luck counter on target creature. Creatures with luck counters on them have base power and toughness 7/7 and have trample.

card.name: SAVE The World
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {1} — Scry 2. + {W} — Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. + {W} — Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature target player controls.

card.name: Don-chan
card.text: Menace Battle cry (Whenever this creature attacks, each other attacking creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.)

card.name: Traveling Komasan
card.text: {1}{G}: Exile target card from a graveyard. If it was a creature card, this creature explores. Activate only as a sorcery. (To explore, reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Ellen Ripley
card.text: {W}: Put a +1/+1 counter on Ellen Ripley. This ability costs {1} more to activate for each counter on Ellen Ripley. Whenever a creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it dies, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Rainbow Dash
card.text: Flying Sonic Rainboom — Whenever Rainbow Dash attacks, add {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end. This mana can't be spent to cast spells from your hand.

card.name: Pinkie Pie, Party Pony
card.text: Other creatures you control get +1/+0. {3}{W}: Create a 1/1 white and red Balloon creature token with flying.

card.name: Katie Forester
card.text: Yokai Watch — Once each turn, when Katie Forester enters or you cast a creature spell, create a 1/1 black Spirit creature token. {4}{R}{W}: Tokens you control get +1/+0 and gain flying until end of turn.

card.name: I Am The Doctor
card.text: Counter target spell. Its controller draws a card and you create a Clue token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

card.name: Laurie Strode, Final Girl
card.text: Lifelink Whenever Laurie Strode attacks alone, you may have each player sacrifice a creature.

card.name: Beat
card.text: Riot (This creature enters with your choice of a +1/+1 counter or haste.) Other creatures you control have riot.

card.name: Ivy, Rock Solid Gargoyle
card.text: Flying Air Drop — Whenever Ivy attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains flying until end of turn. Then if it has three or more counters on it, it gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: The Wither Storm
card.text: Flying Whenever The Wither Storm enters or attacks, defending player sacrifices an artifact, a creature, an enchantment, and a land.

card.name: Trust No One
card.text: Choose one — • Exile target nonland, noncreature card from your graveyard and put three time card counters on it. If it doesn't have suspend, it gains suspend. • Exile target creature and put three time counters on it. If it doesn't have suspend, it gains suspend.

card.name: Delay
card.text: Counter target spell. If the spell is countered this way, exile it with three time counters on it instead of putting it into its owner's graveyard. If it doesn't have suspend, it gains suspend. (At the beginning of its owner's upkeep, they remove a time counter. When the last is removed, they may play it without paying its mana cost. If it's a creature, it has haste.)

card.name: Mapmaking
card.text: Create a Map token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery.") Draw a card.

card.name: Greyroot Parasite
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets -0/-1. At the beginning of the upkeep of enchanted creature's controller, that player loses 3 life unless they sacrifice that creature or discard a card.

card.name: Santa Claus, Father Christmas
card.text: Gift a card (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, when it enters, they draw a card.) When Santa Claus enters, if the gift was promised, he deals 4 damage to any target. Exhaust — {1}{R}{G}{W}: Create two 1/1 white Elf creature tokens with haste. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Hatsune Miku, Digital Diva
card.text: Flash When Hatsune Miku enters, return target spell or nonland permanent to its owner's hand. [+1]: Tap or untap target nonland permanent. [0]: Draw a card, then discard a card. [-6]: Gain control of target permanent.

card.name: The Smokestack Twins
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, create a tapped Treasure token. {1}, Sacrifice another creature or artifact: Each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Gommage
card.text: Exile target creature or planeswalker. If it had counters on it, put one of its counters on a permanent you control.

card.name: Expedition 33
card.text: Lifelink Clair Obscur — {2}{W}{B}: Create an X/X white and black Elemental creature token, where X is the amount of life you've gained this turn. Activate only as a sorcery and only once each turn.

card.name: Inspired Eevee
card.text: Inspired Eevee enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. Whenever a creature you control dies, you may move a counter from it onto another target creature.

card.name: Noriaki Kakyoin
card.text: Whenever you put a counter on another creature you control, put a counter of the same kind on Noriaki Kakyoin. This ability triggers only once each turn. {X}{G}, {T}: Create Hierophant Green, a legendary 0/0 green Spirit creature token with reach. Put X +1/+1 counters on it. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Voracious Sniffer
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or you expend 4, create your choice of a Food token or a 1/1 green Plant creature token. (You expend 4 as you spend your fourth total mana to cast spells during a turn.)

card.name: Void Given Form
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, add {B}. Spend this mana only to activate an ability of a creature or artifact source you control. {B}: This creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Mountaineer's Resolve
card.text: Enchant creature Whenever enchanted creature attacks, it gains double strike until end of turn. Blitz {1}{R} (If you cast this spell for its blitz cost, it gains haste and "When this permanent dies, draw a card". Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.)

card.name: Dreamscape
card.text: When Dreamscape enters, shuffle any number of cards from your hand into your library, then draw that many cards. {1}{U}, Sacrifice Dreamscape: Scry 1, then draw a card.

card.name: Gone Fishin'
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile up to one other target nonland permanent until this enchantment leaves the battlefield. {7}{U}, Sacrifice Gone Fishin': Create Duke Fishron, a 10/10 legendary blue Fish creature token with flying and ward {2}.

card.name: Build the Stage
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+0. Cascade (When you cast this spell, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card that costs less. You may cast it without paying its mana cost. Put the exiled cards on the bottom in a random order.)

card.name: AZ
card.text: When AZ enters, if you cast it, you may destroy all other creatures. Exhaust — {X}{B}{B}: Return target creature card with mana value X from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: The Defect
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a 1/1 colorless Orb artifact creature token with flying and "This token can't block."

card.name: The Dragonborn, One They Fear
card.text: Reach When The Dragonborn enters, you may destroy target artifact, enchantment, or creature with flying. If you don't, look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a creature or land card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in any order.

card.name: Walking Wake, Apex Beast
card.text: Whenever Walking Wake attacks, discover 5. If you cast a creature spell this way, it enters tapped and attacking. (To discover 5, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card with mana value 5 or less. Cast it without paying its mana cost or put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order.)

card.name: The Master, So Hungry
card.text: Other creatures you control are Food artifacts in addition to their other types and have "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this permanent: You gain 3 life." Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Arachnids in the UK
card.text: All creatures get -3/-3 until end of turn. Create a Mutagen token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Rarity, Fashionista
card.text: When Rarity enters, create a Royal role token attached to target creature you control. (If you control another Role on it, put that one into the graveyard. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has ward {1}.) 2{W}W: Create a token that's a copy of target Aura you control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Bind Silk
card.text: Web-slinging {W} (You may cast this spell for {W} if you also return a tapped creature you control to its owner's hand.) Exile target creature. Its controller creates a 1/1 green Spider creature token with reach.

card.name: Claire, Far From Home
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Claire has flying and lifelink as long as its power is 2 or more.

card.name: Bethany, the Zealot
card.text: Lemegeton — When Bethany enters, exile the top five cards of your library face down. You may look at them for as long as they remain exiled. If you would draw a card, you may skip that draw instead. If you do, put a card exiled with Bethany into your hand and you lose 1 life.

card.name: How to Train Your Dragon
card.text: When How to Train Your Dragon enters, create a 1/1 black Dragon creature token with flying. Creatures you control have training. (Whenever a creature you control attacks with another creature with greater power, put a +1/+1 counter on the creature with lesser power.)

card.name: Mejiro Palmer
card.text: Soulbond (You may pair this creature with another unpaired creature when either enters. They remain paired for as long as you control both of them.) As long as Mejiro Palmer is paired with another creature, each of those creatures has double strike and haste.

card.name: Pomni
card.text: If a triggered ability of another legendary creature you control triggers, that ability triggers an additional time.

card.name: The Child
card.text: Protection from tokens Hole Punch — When The Child enters, destroy target creature. If that creature dies this way, its controller creates two tokens that are copies of that creature, except their power is half that creature's power and their toughness is half that creature's toughness. Round up each time.

card.name: Yharon, Dragon of Rebirth
card.text: Flying, haste Undying (When Yharon dies, if it had no +1/+1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a +1/+1 counter on it.) If a source you control would deal damage to an opponent or a permanent an opponent controls, it deals that much damage plus Yharon's power instead.

card.name: Walter White, Breaking Bad
card.text: Whenever Walter White becomes tapped, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. Whenever you discard a card, crystallize. This ability triggers only once each turn. (Put a +1/+1 counter on a creature you control or create a Treasure.)

card.name: Zooble
card.text: Zooble enters with three +1/+1 counters, a reach counter, a trample counter and a vigilance counter on it. At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may move a counter from Zooble onto another creature.

card.name: Maxwell, Scribblenaut
card.text: {T}: Choose a card name that hasn't been chosen from among Ajani's Pridemate, Snapcaster Mage, Dark Confidant, Young Pyromancer and Tarmogoyf. Create a copy of the card with the chosen name. You may cast the copy without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Impostor Among Us
card.text: Suspect up to one target creature. (A suspected creature has menace and can't block.) Draw a card.

card.name: Heaven Sent
card.text: Time loop (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Remove them all after III.) I — Create a 1/1 blue Doctor creature token. II — You may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. III — Heaven Sent deals 1 damage to target opponent. (Then do it again.)

card.name: Jacket, Midnight Animal
card.text: Don The Mask — When Jacket enters, choose a creature type. Jacket gains that type. (This effect doesn't end.) Menace Other creatures you control that share a creature type with Jacket have menace.

card.name: Pass
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Then move all +1/+1 counters on that creature to up to one other target creature. If one or more +1/+1 counters are moved this way, you gain that much life.

card.name: Romeo, the Admin
card.text: Cascade. If you cast a spell this way, it gains deathtouch and lifelink. (When you cast this spell, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card that costs less. You may cast it without paying its mana cost. Put the exiled cards on the bottom in a random order.)

card.name: The Impostor
card.text: You may have this creature enter as a copy of any creature on the battlefield, except it has deathtouch and lifelink.
